ddls:
CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "strategy_version" TEXT /* Version of the strategy */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the asset details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used for the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "buy_sell" INTEGER /* Buy or sell indicator (1 for buy, -1 for sell) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the trade */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price of the trade */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss price of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trade was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the trade details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade execution */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price of the trade execution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units executed in the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the execution was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the execution details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., gross PnL) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date for which the metric is calculated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metric details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the portfolio details */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "portfolio_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio asset */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the asset was added to the portfolio */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the asset allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "market_data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Open price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price of the asset */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price of the asset */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Close price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the asset on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the market data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk management metric (e.g., VaR, expected shortfall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the risk management metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date for which the risk metric is calculated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the risk metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the risk metric details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., trade execution, market event) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the notification details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
